obligations.rule: The function must reject strings that are not valid fully qualified domain names (FQDNs).
obligations.why: The README specifies that the function validates FQDNs.

obligations.rule: The function must reject FQDNs without a TLD when `require_tld` is true.
obligations.why: The README specifies `require_tld: true` as the default behavior.

obligations.rule: The function must allow underscores in domain parts when `allow_underscores` is true.
obligations.why: The README specifies `allow_underscores` as an option.

obligations.rule: The function must allow trailing dots when `allow_trailing_dot` is true.
obligations.why: The README specifies `allow_trailing_dot` as an option.

obligations.rule: The function must allow numeric TLDs when `allow_numeric_tld` is true.
obligations.why: The README specifies `allow_numeric_tld` as an option.

obligations.rule: The function must allow wildcard domains when `allow_wildcard` is true.
obligations.why: The README specifies `allow_wildcard` as an option.

obligations.rule: The function must ignore the max length constraint when `ignore_max_length` is true.
obligations.why: The README specifies `ignore_max_length` as an option.

test_groups.title: Baseline FQDN validation
test_groups.rationale: Tests the default behavior of the validator without any options.

test_groups.title: Validation with allow_underscores enabled
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when underscores are allowed in domain parts.

test_groups.title: Validation with allow_trailing_dot enabled
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when trailing dots are allowed.

test_groups.title: Validation with allow_numeric_tld enabled
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when numeric TLDs are allowed.

test_groups.title: Validation with allow_wildcard enabled
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when wildcard domains are allowed.

test_groups.title: Validation with ignore_max_length enabled
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when the max length constraint is ignored.
